case_title: MASTE, BRENDA VS OLD FIRST PRESBYTERIAN CHURCH

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDANCE FROM BRENDA MASTE TO THE PRESIDING JUDGE RECEIVED AND FILED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY MASTE, BRENDA AS TO DEFENDANT OLD FIRST PRESBYTERIAN CHURCH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OLD FIRST PRESBYTERIAN CHURCH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MASTE, BRENDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OLD FIRST PRESBYTERIAN CHURCH SUSAN YOUNG IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
